closureNotes.outcome:
Cold-start discipline foundation landed clean at SR main 01217ac (PR #153). F0B85LNSTC4 single-anchor variant — all 5 files landed in single SR PR with no EB-CLI execute phase. Tarball-driven via apply.py: SHA drift refuse + idempotent NO-OP + generator try-list + post-write SHA verify discipline all engaged at apply time.

Five instances LIVE on SR main:
- skills/_instances/org/cold-start-discipline/skill-instance.json (9507 bytes, working-model lifecycleStatus, pushy triggerMode, paired to RULE-PIPELINE-COLD-START-VERIFICATION-1 via pairedRule urn match)
- skills/_instances/org/cold-start-discipline/SKILL.md (7881 bytes, generated by luhtech-skill-generate v1.0.0, generationMetadata.sourceJsonSha verified against skill-instance.json contents)
- schemas/_instances/rules/RULE-PIPELINE-COLD-START-VERIFICATION-1.json (5554 bytes, activeTier human-loop, UP-promotion evidenceClass populated with 3-consecutive-failures substrate)
- schemas/_instances/rules/RULE-COMMS-CREDENTIAL-PATTERN-REDACTION-1.json (5667 bytes, activeTier working-model, first portfolio credential-class rule, second COMMS namespace after RULE-CROSS-CHAT-SURFACE-NOTIFICATION-1)
- schemas/_instances/deliverables/d-2026-06-07-eb-cold-start-discipline-foundation.json (7473 bytes)

Provenance: filed after three consecutive cold-start failures 2026-06-07: 2 agents fabricated portfolio state from handoff documents (operator hours lost), 1 echoed credential references from project knowledge and panicked (chat deleted). Research substrate LUHTECH-COLD-START-DISCIPLINE-RESEARCH-2026-06-07.md captures R1-R9 grounding + risk register + sequencing forward.

10 CI checks all GREEN: validate-instances pass 1m6s + 9 others. 0 in-PR fix commits — tarball-driven write discipline meant no hand-authoring drift. 0 --admin overrides. Notify Aggregator skipping was expected per CI design.

Deploy posture forward: Anthropic org-skills .zip upload is the L4 manual Step 4 of skill deploy doctrine 2026-06-05. Track A standalone SKILL.md from EB-chat session outputs OR Track B canonical SKILL.md (now LIVE at SR, 7881 bytes) — Track B is canonical going forward. BT skill-sync.py SKILL_SET bump is a separate subsequent deliverable (d-2026-06-XX-bt-skill-sync-cold-start-discipline) per memory #18 scope-lock.
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
No override invoked. Tarball-driven apply.py executed clean first-try. The discipline pattern (SHA drift refuse + idempotent NO-OP + post-write verify) prevented any authoring-layer drift at apply time. Generator try-list resolved successfully for SKILL.md generation. ajv canonical 3-flag validation passed on all 4 schema-bound instances at P2.4. No in-PR fix commits required.

Forward observation: this is the cleanest single-anchor deploy executed this session. The F0B85LNSTC4 single-anchor variant (no EB-CLI execute phase, all artifacts land via single SR PR) is now proven for SR-internal work where the deliverable IS the schema-bound artifacts themselves. Pattern survives for future skill + rule pairs.
